section.title: Reviews
section.lead: What people say about working with this organisation. Anyone can leave a review.

summary.empty: No reviews yet. Be the first to share your experience.
summary.count: {count, plural, =0 {No reviews} one {# review} other {# reviews}}
summary.barLabel: {stars, plural, one {# star} other {# stars}}: {count, plural, =0 {no reviews} one {# review} other {# reviews}}

list.emptyBody: Be the first to share your experience of this organisation.

reply.label: Your reply
reply.placeholder: Respond to this review on behalf of your organisation.

form.title: Write a review
form.name: Your name
form.emailHint: Used to verify your review. Never shown publicly.
form.ratingLegend: Select a rating from 1 to 5 stars
form.bodyHint: Optional. Share what stood out about working with this organisation.
form.successBody: Your review has been published and is now visible to others.
form.throttled: You have posted a review recently. Please try again later.
